content:
Use run_bash exactly once with cwd "/Users/normy/autobyteus_org/autobyteus-worktrees/autobyteus-ts-bash-html-corruption/tickets/in-progress/autobyteus-ts-bash-html-corruption/validation-evidence/workspaces/openai-full-agent-2026-05-14T09-02-39-228Z" and timeout_seconds 20. The command must have SHA-256 83297e34a8b60089ff744b01933ebb1bfc2c04f6bb788724bcdaac0785f9a3e7 and must be exactly between BEGIN_COMMAND and END_COMMAND. BEGIN_COMMAND node <<'NODE' const fs=require('node:fs');const crypto=require('node:crypto');function makeExpectedHtml(){const rows=[];for(let i=0;i<900;i+=1)rows.push(``);const data=[];for(let i=0;i<500;i+=1)data.push(`{x:${(i*17)%1200},y:${(i*41)%680},s:${i%9}}`);return ` OpenAI Full Agent Jet
OpenAI Full Agent Jet
${rows.join(' ')} `; }const html=makeExpectedHtml();fs.mkdirSync('agent-jet-game',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('agent-jet-game/index.html',html,'utf8');console.log('sha256='+crypto.createHash('sha256').update(html).digest('hex'));console.log('bytes='+Buffer.byteLength(html,'utf8')); NODE END_COMMAND After the tool completes, provide a final one-sentence confirmation.
